content: shop-floor lighting _1_ workers’ productivity
analysis: affected 影响。根据上下文，此处需要一个动词，表示车间照明如何影响工人的生产力。

content: the studies ended _2_ giving their name to the “Hawthorne effect,”
analysis: end up doing sth 最终成为，最终处于某种状态，强调结果出人意料。

content: the very _3_ of being experimented upon changed subjects’ behavior.
analysis: act 行为。此处需要一个名词，表示“受试”这一行为本身改变了受试者的行为。

content: The idea arose because of the _4_ behavior of the women in the plant.
analysis: perplexing 令人费解的。根据下文，女工的行为令人不解，因为无论照明增加还是减少，生产率都提高。

content: According to _5_ of the experiments, their hourly output rose when lighting was increased
analysis: accounts 描述，叙述，说明。空格后内容是对实验现象的客观说明。

content: It did not _6_ what was done in the experiment
analysis: matter 事关紧要，重要。it doesn't matter ... 意思是……无所谓，不重要。

content: _7_ something was changed, productivity rose.
options: {"A": "as far as", "B": "for fear that", "C": "in case that", "D": "so long as"}
analysis: so long as 只要。表示某种情况发生的充分条件。

content: A(n) _8_ that they were being experimented upon seemed to be _9_ to alter workers’ behavior
analysis: awareness 意识。联系上段末句，此处重申“霍桑效应”的概念。

content: A(n) _8_ that they were being experimented upon seemed to be _9_ to alter workers’ behavior
analysis: enough 足够的。表示足够满足某种目的或需求的。

content: A(n) _8_ that they were being experimented upon seemed to be _9_ to alter workers’ behavior _10_ itself.
analysis: by itself 单独地。by itself 意为单独地;without anyone else。

content: After several decades, the same data were _11_ to econometric analysis.
analysis: subjected 经历，遭受。subject sth to sth 可以表示“让某人/事经受某行为”。

content: _12_ the descriptions on record, no systematic _13_ was found that levels of productivity were related to changes in lighting.
analysis: Contrary to 与……相反的。与之前的实验结论相反，新的分析结果未发现两者存在关联。

content: _12_ the descriptions on record, no systematic _13_ was found that levels of productivity were related to changes in lighting.
analysis: evidence 证据。新实验未发现两者存在关联的证据。

content: It turns out that the peculiar way of conducting the experiments may have led to _14_ interpretations of what happened.
analysis: misleading 误导的。进行实验的特殊方式可能导致了对所发生现象的错误解释。

content: _15_, lighting was always changed on a Sunday.
analysis: For example 例如。下文举例说明实验中照明条件总是在周日改变。

content: When work started again on Monday, output _16_ rose compared with the previous Saturday
analysis: duly 如期地；适时地；按时地。周一复工时的产量增加是一种常态。

content: output _16_ rose compared with the previous Saturday and _17_ to rise for the next couple of days.
analysis: continued 继续。工人在一周前几天产出都较高。

content: _18_, a comparison with data for weeks when there was no experimentation showed that output always went up on Mondays.
analysis: However 然而。实验结果令人意外。

content: Workers _19_ to be diligent for the first few days of the week in any case, before _20_ a plateau and then slackening off.
analysis: tended 往往会。表示规律性或客观倾向性。

content: Workers _19_ to be diligent for the first few days of the week in any case, before _20_ a plateau and then slackening off.
analysis: hitting 达到。hit a plateau 为固定搭配“达到停滞期、稳定阶段”。
